data.body:
[Daily Free Recruitment x10 Event]

Starting today, use one Recruitment x10 per day for free!
You can use a total of a 100 Free Recruitments during this Event!

🗓️Period: 9/10 (Sat) 2:00 AM - 9/20 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)
Details: https://m.nexon.com/forum/thread/100794
